title: allium capitellatum
intro: Allium capitellatum is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, commonly known as the bulbous onion or narrow-leaved onion. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Allium capitellatum include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, reduce fever, and help in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
